raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Sonoma State Commitment initiative will provide educational opportunities for tens of thousands of students in the North Bay region.",
    "The initiative includes a $45 million state investment to stabilize key programs at Sonoma State University.",
    "The funding from the Sonoma State Commitment aims to restore faculty positions and academic degrees at Sonoma State University.",
    "A key component of the initiative is the construction of a first-of-its-kind career center to connect students and graduates with local employers.",
    "The Sonoma State Commitment will launch an aggressive recruitment campaign to expand college access for thousands of students.",
    "The initiative will invest in new academic degrees to address regional and statewide workforce needs.",
    "The nursing program at Sonoma State will be expanded to meet the growing demand from healthcare providers.",
    "The state budget will also allocate an additional $5 million to the CSU system to assist low enrollment campuses with expanded student outreach and recruitment efforts.",
    "The funding will help ensure that Sonoma State can chart a path toward becoming an institution more students choose to attend."
  ]
}
```
